case_title: JUN PEI KWAN VS. HENRY JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWAN, JUN PEI AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HENRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED JUL-02-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HENRY
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KWAN, JUN PEI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2013 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT, HENRY JOHNSON ON 8/14/2013 (ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY KWAN, JUN PEI AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---KEN WONG. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY KWAN, JUN PEI JOHNSON, HENRY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWAN, JUN PEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HENRY PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE HIS DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
